title: Implement checkout promotions and validation
instructions: Implement the checkout rules across catalog, promotions, and checkout. Unknown SKUs must raise ValueError("unknown sku: <sku>"). Quantities above product stock must raise ValueError("insufficient stock: <sku>"). Marker lines get a 10% line discount when quantity is at least 10. VIP customers get a 5% order discount when the discounted subtotal is at least 50. summarize_cart must return rounded line subtotals, discounts, totals, aggregate subtotal, aggregate discount, and final total. Keep the tests unchanged.
constraints: Prefer changes limited to catalog.py, promotions.py, and checkout.py.
Round monetary values to two decimal places at the returned boundaries.
Apply VIP order discount after line discounts.
acceptance: Unknown SKUs and insufficient stock raise the specified ValueError messages.
Marker bulk line discount and VIP order discount are both applied correctly.
